parsedObject.reason: Building on the outline stage, the next logical step is to create a compelling product description for the 'AI Social Media Post Prompt Pack' to attract buyers. This progresses the product towards being ready for listing.
parsedObject.productTitle: AI Social Media Post Prompt Pack
parsedObject.listingTitle: AI Social Media Post Prompts: Effortless Content Ideas for Engagement
parsedObject.shortDescription: Unlock endless social media post ideas with our AI prompt pack. Boost engagement & save time.
parsedObject.description:
Tired of staring at a blank screen, struggling to come up with fresh social media content? Our AI Social Media Post Prompt Pack is your ultimate solution! Designed for busy content creators and marketers, this pack provides a curated collection of powerful prompts that leverage AI to generate engaging, on-brand posts in seconds.

Stop the content creation grind and start delighting your audience. With these prompts, you'll:

*  **Save hours of brainstorming time.**
*  **Generate diverse post ideas** for any platform (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, etc.).
*  **Craft compelling captions** that drive engagement and clicks.
*  **Tailor content to specific goals** like promotions, Q&As, behind-the-scenes, and more.
*  **Overcome writer's block** with ready-to-use prompts.

This pack is perfect for small business owners, freelancers, social media managers, and anyone looking to elevate their online presence without the creative exhaustion. Simply copy, paste, and adapt these prompts to your needs and watch your social media performance soar!
bullets: Generate unlimited post ideas with AI-powered prompts.
Craft engaging captions for Facebook, Instagram, Twitter & more.
Save time and overcome writer's block instantly.
Boost engagement and drive traffic to your content.
Perfect for marketers, creators, and small businesses.
parsedObject.publishInstructions: List on Gumroad or Etsy. Ensure product images are eye-catching and highlight benefits.
